channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Oil surges 5% after Trump says ceasefire with Iran is over
item.description: Trump's comments came after the U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran in retaliation for attacks on commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump says he doesn't want anything to do with Spain: 'Cut off all trade'
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump slammed Spain for not contributing enough to NATO, as he attended the defense alliance summit in Turkey.

item.title: NATO allies put on a united front as they meet Trump
item.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte said Wednesday that the alliance was entering its "NATO 3.0" era.

item.title: Trump doubles down on push for control over Greenland as Denmark vows to defend it
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the U.S. needs to control Greenland “for the protection of the world."

item.title: China warns about AI risks with Anthropic's Claude Code
item.description: China said specific versions of Claude Code posed back-door vulnerabilities that could send sensitive information to a remote server.

item.title: SambaNova hits $11 billion valuation as investors back Nvidia chip challengers
item.description: SambaNova is valued at $11 billion after fresh financing led by General Atlantic, as AI chip startups look to challenge Nvidia.

item.title: Lawmakers probe growing use of Chinese AI models in U.S. companies
item.description: An ongoing House Committee investigation is probing the risks involved in the rise of AI built in China.

item.title: Samsung-backed AI chip firm Rebellions targets IPO in South Korea next year, CEO tells CNBC
item.description: Sunghyun Park, CEO of Rebellions, told CNBC that the company is leaning toward a listing on the KOSPI over the KOSDAQ.

item.title: U.S. conducts strikes on multiple Iranian targets after Hormuz Strait ship attacks, Centcom says
item.description: Kuwait accused Iran of fresh attacks after U.S. strikes hit Iranian targets, raising fears over the Strait of Hormuz and oil prices.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz threat level raised to 'severe' after Iran attacks tankers using U.S. Navy route
item.description: Iran's military has warned it will target ships that do not use a northern route approved by Tehran.

item.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
item.description: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

item.title: George E. Johnson, founder of pioneering Black hair products company, dead at 99
item.description: George E. Johnson, the pioneering Chicago entrepreneur whose eponymous company transformed Black hair care in the U.S. died on Monday at age 99.

item.title: CNBC Daily Open: Dispatch from NATO, U.S. strikes Iran and Le Pen is back
item.description: Tensions between the U.S. and its allies heat up at the NATO Summit, while a fresh wave of stikes threatens the ceasefire in Iran.

item.title: U.S. revokes Iran oil sales authorization after tanker attacks
item.description: Treasury had waived sanctions on Iranian oil through Aug. 21 after Washington and Tehran inked an interim deal to reopen Hormuz last month.

item.title: Ukraine has already won the war against Russia, Finnish president tells CNBC
item.description: Ukraine needs NATO, but NATO needs Ukraine just as much, the Finnish president told CNBC on Tuesday.

item.title: Apple begins testing CXMT chips for devices sold in China, FT says
China's rare missile test will push wary Asia-Pacific countries to close ranks, analysts say
item.description: China's rare launch of a ballistic missile launch into the Pacific will push regional powers to deepen their defense ties.

item.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
item.description: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

item.title: Chinese autonomous-driving firm Momenta rises 3% in Hong Kong stock debut
item.description: Chinese autonomous driving firm Momenta debuted on the Hong Kong stock exchange on Wednesday, rising 3%.

item.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
item.description: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

item.title: The implications of Amazon's $25B bond sale, and Microsoft's evolving AI model strategy
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Best credit cards for sports fans: Score presale tickets, earn rewards on merch and more
item.description: CNBC Select rounds up some of the best cards for sports fans, from traveling to games to getting access to presale tickets.

item.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
item.description: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

item.title: Kalshi traders see slim odds U.S. government will take a stake in OpenAI this year
item.description: Traders on the prediction markets platform see a less than 30% likelihood the federal government will take a stake in AI companies Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: Steady your portfolio with these resilient low volatility stocks, UBS says
item.description: Investors may want to turn to low volatility stocks to help protect their portfolios from rocky times, the bank found.

item.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
item.description: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

item.title: The case for S&P 500 8,000 and sticking with Micron, tech, according to Trivariate Research
item.description: When earnings increase at rates as strong as expected, the S&P 500 typically posts high returns, the firm said.

item.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
item.description: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

item.title: DeSantis-backed 'Stop WOKE' law meets appeals court block, teeing up possible Supreme Court fight
item.description: A Trump-appointed judge ruled against Gov. Ron DeSantis' "Stop WOKE Act," leaving Florida’s college speech limits blocked as a Supreme Court appeal looms.

item.title: Jim Cramer says the market's reaction to Samsung may signal a shift in AI leadership
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Samsung's earnings sparked a sell-off in AI hardware stocks, while many tech names that have lagged this year rebounded.
